name: ori_wotw
game: Ori and the Will of the Wisps

options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: difficulty
options.description:
Difficulty of the logic.

- **Moki** (or easy): Recommended for beginners, who only played the game casually.
- **Gorlek** (or medium): Harder paths that can use sword and hammer as movement options, and damage boosts.
- **Kii** (or hard): Hard and precise paths that use energy weapons as movement.
- **Unsafe**: Very hard and unverified paths. Warning: some paths are **extremely hard**.

options.name: glitches
options.description:
Whether the logic includes paths with glitches.

- **Gorlek**: includes grounded sentry jumps, sentry as a fire source, breaking walls with Shuriken, and removing the kill plane in Feeding Grounds.
- **Kii**: glitches are not included in Kii logic yet.
- **Unsafe**: everything else.

options.name: spawn
options.description: Choose the starting location.

options.name: goal
options.description:
Set conditions for entering the final boss. Use the rando wheel (with **V**) to check goal progress.

- **trees**: All trees must be collected.
- **wisps**: All wisps must be collected.
- **quests**: All quests have to be finished.
- **relics**: Place relics in some areas, all of them must be collected.
- **random**: Choose one goal at random among the other selected ones.
  e.g. [random, trees, wisps] will give trees or wisps.
  If only random is selected, it will choose among all goals.

options.name: relic_count
options.description: How many areas contain a relic (no effect without the relic goal).

options.name: launch_fragments
options.description: Spilt Launch into multiple fragments.

options.name: fragments_required
options.description: Set the amount of launch fragments needed to get Launch.

options.name: fragments_count
options.description: Set the amount of launch fragments in the pool. Launch is in logic when all fragments are accessible.

options.name: hard_mode
options.description: Play the game in hard difficulty.

options.name: regenerate_requirements
options.description: Set a logic difficulty at and above which Regenerate is ignored in region requirements.

options.name: free_teleporters
options.description: Remove the requirements on teleporters for their hard lock skill (e.g. Reach TP requires Flap).

options.name: door_rando
options.description: Enable door randomizer.

options.name: qol
options.description: Activate QOL features and gameplay improvements.

options.name: hints
options.description: Display the reward for shrines and trials when activating them.

options.name: zone_hints
options.description: Lupo sells hints that indicate how many progression items are in the area.

options.name: unpopular
options.description:
Enable unpopular paths for unsafe.

These involve tedious or extremely hard tricks. No effect without unsafe and glitches.

options.name: knowledge_hints
options.description: Display useful hints on randomizer knowledge while playing the seed.

options.name: death_link
options.description: Disable/enable death link. Set this to a non-zero integer to specify how many deaths are needed to trigger it.

options.name: tp
options.description: Add most teleporters to the item pool.

options.name: extratp
options.description: Add Ruins, West Pools and Shriek teleporters to the pool.

options.name: bonus
options.description: Add to the pool items specific to the randomizer.

options.name: extra_bonus
options.description: Add to the pool powerful items specific to the randomizer.

options.name: skill_upgrade
options.description: Add to the pool upgrades to skills specific to the randomizer.

options.name: better_spawn
options.description: Open some doors so random spawn works better.

options.name: better_wellspring
options.description: The top door of Wellspring Glades is opened by default.

options.name: no_rain
options.description: Remove the rain in Marsh, and remove Howl.

options.name: no_combat
options.description:
Skip all combat heavy parts.

- **everything**: the same as if you include all the following
- **shrines**: Shrine have their pickup floating above them before the fight
- **arenas**: the arenas start as completed
- **demi bosses**: Demi Bosses like Howl, Beetle and Rock boss start as defeated
- **bosses**: Bosses like Kwolok, Mora and Shriek's combat phases are skipped

options.name: no_trials
options.description: Trials are already completed.

options.name: no_hearts
options.description: Willow hearts are already destroyed.

options.name: quests
options.description:
Change which quests are in the location pool.

- **all**: All quests are present.
- **no hand**: Remove the Hand-to-hand questline from the locations.
- **none**: Remove all quests that involve talking to NPCs. Main quests (e.g. wisps) or rebuilding Glades are still in the pool.

options.name: no_ks
options.description: Open keystone doors by default (and remove keystones from the pool).

options.name: open_mode
options.description: Open most of the doors and obstacles.

options.name: glades_done
options.description: Start with Glades rebuilt and regrown.

options.name: shop_keywords
options.description:
Have the non-local items in the shops attempt to use a keyword system to choose icons.
For example, item with 'map' in their name will have a map icon.
If no keyword fit, then the icon fall back to Classification.

options.name: sword
options.description: Choose to have Sword at the beginning.

options.name: regenerate
options.description: Choose to have Regenerate at the beginning.

options.name: vanilla_shop_upgrades
options.description: Weapon upgrades and shards in shops are not randomized.

options.name: launch_on_seir
options.description: Place launch on Seir (i.e. the wisp in the ruins).

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.

options.name: plando_items
options.description: Generic items plando.

options.name: start_inventory_from_pool
options.description:
Start with the specified amount of these items and don't place them in the world. Example: "Bomb: 1"

The game decides what the replacement items will be.
